name: email-triage-and-reply-draft
description: Summarizes unread Gmail items, writes a paste-ready reply draft, and keeps the inbox response loop in one local artifact.
_migration_note: v2: Typed Flow format (role/produces/consumes). v1 used type + export_as.

params.content:
# Gmail Inbox Triage

Generated: {{run_utc_now}}
Tone: {{reply_tone}}

## Triage Output

{{gmail_triage}}

## Suggested Reply Draft

Use the triage above to write a short reply with these parts:
- Acknowledge receipt
- Confirm the requested action or next step
- Mention any blocker or missing detail
- Close with the next date or action owner

### Paste-Ready Template

Hi,

Thanks for the update. I reviewed the items below:

{{gmail_triage}}

My current response is:
- 

Next step:
- 

Best,
Kyberion
